description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, modern design with a metallic gold and black color scheme, accented by silver and bronze components. The long barrel is equipped with a prominent muzzle and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it, suggesting a high-capacity configuration. The receiver area is detailed with mechanical elements, including a visible bolt and a robust trigger assembly. The stock is angular and compact, with a padded butt and ergonomic grip, optimized for stability and comfort. A scope or sighting device is mounted on top, enhancing its precision for urban tactical use. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer or composite elements for the grip and stock.
description: A modern, gold and black shotgun with a long barrel, tubular magazine, and compact ergonomic stock, featuring metallic and polymer components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, tubular magazine, and alignment of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the long barrel, tubular magazine, detailed receiver, and compact stock with mounted sight.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock's padded butt, grip, and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile displaying the same mechanical details, with clear visibility of the action mechanism and stock design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; long, vented barrel with no visible ribbing
attribute_stock_type: full stock with ergonomic grip and padded butt
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with reinforced edges and a smooth contour
